title: lepechinia lancifolia
intro: Lepechinia lancifolia, also known as Hierba Buena, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lepechinia lancifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, among others. Lepechinia lancifolia can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
